source: Library of Congress, Prints & Photographs Division — Carol M. Highsmith Archive
license: Public domain (dedicated to the public by the photographer per 1991 LoC agreement)
title: Scenic Seward Highway in the Chugach National Forest, Alaska
description: The Seward Highway winding through the Chugach National Forest with mountains and forests flanking the road. The highway connects Seward to Anchorage and is designated an All-American Road.
alt: Scenic Seward Highway winding through Chugach National Forest with mountains and forests flanking the road
